task: Get SimpleSwap pool server creating exchanges — totalReplenished must increment from 0

stories.description: Unlock stuck replenishmentLock — add admin endpoint to release locks
acceptanceCriteria: Admin endpoint returns {success: true} and confirms lock released
After unlocking, /admin/fill-sequential can be called for price 29 without 'Already filling' error

stories.description: Add Steel session timeout to prevent indefinite hangs
acceptanceCriteria: createExchange() aborts with clear error if Steel session creation takes >30s
createExchange() aborts with clear error if CDP WebSocket connect takes >30s
Aborted sessions still call browser.close() and releaseSteelSession() in finally block
Failed attempts properly release locks so health check can retry

stories.description: Verify exchange creation actually succeeds end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Calling POST /admin/fill-sequential {pricePoint: 29} results in pool growing from 0 to ≥1
failedReplenishments does NOT increase on the successful run
A fresh exchange URL appears in /admin/pool for price 29

stories.description: Health check triggers replenishment for empty pools automatically
acceptanceCriteria: Pool at 0 for price 29 gets replenished automatically within 2 health check cycles (2 minutes)
Health check does not trigger for pools that already have items (no redundant fills)
replenishmentLock prevents concurrent fills for the same price
